name: Sunset Jewelry And Loan
description_short: Sunset Jewelry & Loan is a pawn shop in Clearwater, FL offering personal asset loans, jewelry buying/selling, and repair services with a focus on unique inventory.
description_long:
Sunset Jewelry & Loan operates as a pawn shop in the Hercules/Sunset Point area of Clearwater, Florida. The business has established itself as a community fixture, with customer testimonials indicating long-term relationships and repeat business over multiple years. The company leverages its location and reputation to serve customers seeking quick cash loans against personal valuables. Their website emphasizes customer testimonials highlighting staff professionalism and willingness to help customers through financial challenges.

The company offers a diverse range of services beyond basic pawning. Primary services include personal asset loans (collateral-based lending), buying and selling used jewelry and merchandise, estate purchasing, jewelry repair, watch battery replacement, and appraisals or opinions of value. They maintain an inventory of estate jewelry and miscellaneous items available for purchase. The website indicates they have been featured in local media (Best of the Bay with Al Keck), suggesting some community recognition and visibility.

Sunset Jewelry & Loan distinguishes itself through customer-focused service, with named staff (Kirk is mentioned by name in testimonials) and emphasis on treating customers with respect. The business presents itself as offering unique antiques and quality jewelry alongside core pawn services. They position their staff as holding professional qualifications and certified memberships in professional associations, though specific organizations are not named on the available website content.

As a pawn shop, this business serves customers needing quick liquidity against personal property, which carries inherent financial trade-offs. While customer testimonials are positive, potential borrowers should understand that pawning involves surrendering collateral and paying redemption to recover items. The website provides limited information about loan terms, interest rates, or specific conditions, requiring in-person inquiry or direct contact for detailed lending terms.
pros: Long-standing customer relationships with multi-year repeat business cited in testimonials
Staff identified by name (Kirk) as honest and easy to work with
Diverse service offerings beyond loans: jewelry repair, watch batteries, appraisals, estate purchasing
Featured in local media (Best of the Bay broadcast)
Curated inventory of unique antiques and estate jewelry items for sale
Professional qualifications and certified memberships claimed for staff
Positioned as customer-focused with testimonials emphasizing going 'over and above to help'
cons: Website provides no details on loan terms, interest rates, redemption periods, or APR
Requires surrendering physical collateral with risk of item loss if loan cannot be repaid
Limited transparency about redemption fees, storage fees, or other charges
No information about loan-to-value ratios or appraisal methodologies
Staff professional certifications and association memberships mentioned but not specified or verifiable from content provided
best_for: Customers needing immediate cash who own jewelry, watches, or collectibles they can temporarily part with
People seeking to sell estate jewelry or inherited items quickly without auction delays
Repeat customers with established relationships who need short-term loans against personal property
Shoppers looking for affordable used jewelry, antiques, or unique second-hand merchandise
diagnosis: Sunset Jewelry & Loan is best suited for individuals who own valuable items (jewelry, watches, collectibles) and need quick cash liquidity, or those seeking affordable used jewelry and antiques. The primary caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering collateral with the risk of permanent loss if the loan cannot be repaid, and the website lacks critical transparency about loan terms, interest rates, and fees—making direct contact essential before borrowing.
services: Buy and loan on items of value
